subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth within this Most Great Prison unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of the mighty Throne, that it may draw them unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق فی هذا السجن الاعظم لمن آمن بالله رب العرش العظیم لیجذبه الی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God
